title: bug affecting simple function to pick an item at random
description:
### What happens?

My bug, my apologies.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, values VARCHAR(255));
SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(values, ',', 1), ',', -1) AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(values, ',', 2), ',', -1) AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(values, ',', 4), ',', -1) AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: selecting an out-of-bounds index from an array
